name: I'm on beam under dock
hints: You're on a beam under the dock. There's a silver dollar here and more may be hidden.
LOOK DOCK or LOOK UP to find hidden items attached to the dock above you.
GET the *Silver Dollar* treasure. LOOK DOCK and LOOK UP both find additional hidden items. DOWN drops into the sea (room 11).
Collect the Silver Dollar and search the dock with LOOK DOCK or LOOK UP for more items. DOWN goes to the sea.
notes: Under the dock on a beam. Contains the *Silver Dollar* treasure. LOOK DOCK and LOOK UP both find additional hidden items (auto-pickup). DOWN drops to the sea (room 11). Accessed by diving/swimming from the sea area near the dock.
